x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Untrained PI solutions produce no AI recommendations. Each solution must be trained on sufficient historical data before Now Assist can surface routing, classification, or similarity suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Navigate to Predictive Intelligence > Solutions and train each active solution. Ensure a minimum of 1,000 historical records exist per solution before training. Retrain solutions after major data changes or schema updates.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cec
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Untrained PI solutions produce no AI recommendations. Each solution must be trained on sufficient historical data before Now Assist can surface routing, classification, or similarity suggestions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Predictive Intelligence Trained Solutions</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('ml_solution');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No active PI solutions found',
            finding: 'No active Predictive Intelligence solutions found. Create and train PI solutions for incident categorization, routing, and similarity before enabling Now Assist.'
        };
    }

    var gaTrained = new GlideAggregate('ml_solution');
    gaTrained.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTrained.addQuery('state', 'trained');
    gaTrained.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTrained.query();
    var trained = gaTrained.next() ? parseInt(gaTrained.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((trained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = trained + ' of ' + total + ' active PI solutions trained (' + pct + '%)';

    if (trained >= total) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'All ' + trained + ' active PI solutions are trained. Now Assist routing and classification recommendations have full AI model coverage.'
        };
    } else if (trained >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: (total - trained) + ' of ' + total + ' active PI solutions are untrained. Untrained solutions produce zero AI recommendations — Now Assist routing and classification will have gaps.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'None of the ' + total + ' active PI solutions are trained. Now Assist routing and classification rely entirely on trained PI models — currently zero AI recommendations can be generated.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>PLATFORM</module>
<number>CHK0006109</number>
<order>50</order>
<remediation_guidance>Navigate to Predictive Intelligence > Solutions and train each active solution. Ensure a minimum of 1,000 historical records exist per solution before training. Retrain solutions after major data changes or schema updates.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851cec</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
